db2vwf-experiment.db2vwf-deck:
go athena
init inf=Lab05_2.3.str
# Pattern photoresist deposit photoresist thick=0.5
struct outf=Lab07_5_PR.str
# Etch Any Shape etch photoresist start x = 9.65 y = -2 etch cont x = 9.65 y = 2 etch cont x = 15.5 y = 2 etch done x = 15.5 y = -2
etch photoresist start x = 34.5 y = -2 etch cont x = 34.5 y = 2 etch cont x = 40.5 y = 2 etch done x = 40.5 y = -2
struct outf=Lab07_5_PR_etched.str # For 0.1 um, we have 1 um/min, meaning we do 6 seconds # Monte Carlo Machine Deposition rate.depo machine=Monte_Carlo_Machine_Pt aluminum a.s sigma.dep=0.2 monte1 dep.rate=1.0 stick.coef=1 angle1=0 mcseed=5 # Machine Deposition deposit machine=Monte_Carlo_Machine_Pt time=2000 seconds n.particle=300 divisions=10
struct outf=Lab07_5_without_strip.str
strip photoresist
struct outf=Lab07_5_stripped.str
tonyplot Lab05_2.3.str Lab07_5_PR.str Lab07_5_PR_etched.str Lab07_5_without_strip.str Lab07_5_stripped.str
quit
